title: Cobblemon histories
description:
Step into a world where history and adventure intertwine with Pokémon!
Create your own story and play as you want !
body:
# Cobblemon Histories
Step into a world where history and adventure intertwine with Pokémon! Cobblemon Histories enhances the Cobblemon experience by immersing players in a rich, lore-filled world full of exploration, battles, and discovery.

- Ancient Biomes & Structures – Uncover ruins, temples, and lost civilizations tied to legendary Pokémon.
- Survival & Progression – Gather resources, craft tools, and train your Pokémon to thrive in a dynamic environment.
- Expanded Gameplay – Additional mods bring new mechanics, enhanced building options, and a deeper RPG experience.
